title: Create But Brassless
description: Create's train casing and it's addon relatives un-brassified for your train building pleasures.
body:
Create But Brassless is a texture pack that changes the texture of the train casing from brass to something more similar to iron. It also changes the textures of some other addons that also include some form of train casing related blocks, you know, for consistency!

![Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ANWVOW6J/images/63b380c06b5e295828bdbb87bd1c502a63699383.png)

Currently supported mods:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

[Create (duh)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

[Create: Blocks & Bogies](https://modrinth.com/mod/blocks-bogies)

[Create Encased](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-encased)

[Create Train Parts](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-train-parts)

[Create: Mixed Casing](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-mixed-casing)

[Create : New Furnitures (couldn't find it on modrinth)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-new-furnitures)

[Dramatic Doors (it has create doors, don't ask)](https://modrinth.com/mod/dramatic-doors)

[Create: Prismatic Shine](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-prismatic-shine)

[Create Trash Cans (texture pack)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/create-trash-cans)

</details>

If I find more train casings in mods that need to be un-brassified I'll try and add them.
